nasb.text: Then the trees of the forest will sing for joy before the Lord; For He is coming to judge the earth.

esv.text: Then shall the trees of the forest sing for joy before the Lord, for he comes to judge the earth.

cnv.text: 那時樹林中的樹木， 必在耶和華面前歡呼， 因為他來要審判全地。

ccb.text: 那时，林中的树木都要在耶和华面前欢唱， 因为祂要来审判天下。
